Line_item: Supabase Pro base (per project per month)
Free_or_included_before_overage: Pro monthly fee includes bundled quotas (DB size, file storage, egress, auth MAU caps per Supabase pricing page; not unlimited).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: You are already on a paid tier. Scale up compute, disk, or move to Team/Enterprise when you hit quotas, need SLAs, or multi-project governance.
Notes: Shared platform bill, not per tenant. Applies to all plans because all tenants use the same backend.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Compute may start at smallest instance included in your bill; confirm in dashboard.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Increase compute size when CPU, memory, or connection limits cause slow queries or errors.
Notes: Compute is billed separately by instance size. Use your actual instance size bill; $10/mo is a common minimum-sized compute example, verify on Supabase pricing.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Included GB-month on Pro before this per-GB rate applies.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Optimize schema, archive cold data, or add paid storage when consistently over included DB size.
Notes: Unit rate. Actual bill depends on total DB size over included quota.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Included file storage on Pro before overage.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Compress assets, use external object store, or pay overage when file volume grows past quota.
Notes: Unit rate. Actual bill depends on total Storage used over included quota.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Included egress on Pro before overage.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Add caching, CDN, or reduce payload size; pay overage if traffic exceeds quota.
Notes: Unit rate. Actual bill depends on total bandwidth over included quota.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Not included unless you subscribe to add-on.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Enable when you need stable outbound IPv4 for allowlists or integrations that require it.
Notes: Only if you enable dedicated IPv4. Otherwise set to 0.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Not included unless you subscribe to add-on.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Add when you need point-in-time recovery for compliance or operational safety beyond backups.
Notes: Point-in-time recovery is an add-on on some plans. Only include if enabled; otherwise set to 0.

Line_item: Dynamic Maps loads (per 1000 after free cap)
Free_or_included_before_overage: Typically 10000 Dynamic Maps loads/mo free per SKU (see free cap row); Google Cloud often gives monthly credits for new accounts (verify billing account).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Enable Cloud billing and set budget alerts before free tier exhaustion; optimize map loads (caching, static maps) when costs climb.
Notes: Unit rate after free cap. Actual bill depends on total map loads across all tenants.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Typically 10000 geocoding requests/mo free per SKU; Cloud credits may apply.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Same as maps: monitor usage in Google Cloud console; batch or cache geocoding when approaching cap.
Notes: Unit rate after free cap. Free cap is typically 10,000 events per month per SKU. Orbyt uses geocoding for address search and location tooling.

Line_item: Dynamic Maps free cap (events per month)
Free_or_included_before_overage: This row is the free monthly event allowance for the SKU (not dollars).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: After 10000/mo on this SKU, paid per-1k rate applies; plan capacity before launch traffic spikes.
Notes: Not a price. Google monthly free allowance for this SKU before per-1k billing starts.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Free geocoding requests/mo before paid tier for this SKU.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Same as Dynamic Maps row: paid rates apply beyond cap.
Notes: Not a price. Google monthly free allowance for geocoding before per-1k billing starts.

Line_item: Resend Pro base (50k emails per month)
Free_or_included_before_overage: Listed Pro plan includes up to 50k emails/mo before overage (verify current Resend tiers).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Upgrade to higher Resend tier or enterprise when volume, deliverability, or support needs exceed 50k/mo or plan features.
Notes: Shared platform bill if you pay for Resend. Applies to all plans because all can send email notifications.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Applies only after included sends in your paid tier are used.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: If overage is frequent, move to a higher base tier so all-in cost is lower than overage stack.
Notes: Unit rate for overage on listed tiers. Actual depends on total emails beyond plan.

Line_item: Resend Free tier included emails (per month)
Free_or_included_before_overage: 3000 sends/mo on Resend Free (reference; production usually uses Pro).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Move to Pro when you exceed 3k/mo, need higher rate limits, dedicated sending, or production SLAs.
Notes: Not a price. Included send volume on Resend Free for comparison; you may be on Pro instead.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Pro includes higher bandwidth, build minutes, and team features than Hobby (see Vercel pricing).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Add seats or talk to Vercel for Enterprise when you need SSO, compliance, or very large scale.
Notes: Per seat pricing. Multiply by number of paid seats. Shared across all plans.

Free_or_included_before_overage: $0/mo with strict non-commercial and resource limits (bandwidth, functions, etc.).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Upgrade to Pro for production traffic, commercial use, team collaboration, and higher limits.
Notes: If you are on Hobby, base is $0 but you may hit limits quickly. Use Pro for production teams.

Free_or_included_before_overage: No free processing; fee is a percent of each successful charge.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Not a SaaS Pro upgrade: rates are standard until very high volume (custom pricing).
Notes: Not USD. Multiply by payment amount to get fee in dollars. Usually paid by merchant, not platform COGS unless you absorb it.

Line_item: Stripe online card fixed fee (US, per transaction)
Free_or_included_before_overage: Per successful charge in addition to percent.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Same as percent row.
Notes: Fixed fee per successful transaction. Usually merchant paid; include only if platform absorbs fees.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Applies on top of base percent for international cards.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: n/a
Starter_USD_or_numeric_per_Unit_column: 0.015 (extra fee: +1.5% of charge on intl cards)
Growth_USD_or_numeric_per_Unit_column: 0.015 (extra fee: +1.5% of charge on intl cards)
Premium_USD_or_numeric_per_Unit_column: 0.015 (extra fee: +1.5% of charge on intl cards)
Notes: Not USD. Added on top of base card percent for international cards.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Applies when Stripe performs currency conversion.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: n/a
Starter_USD_or_numeric_per_Unit_column: 0.01 (extra fee: +1% of charge if FX needed)
Growth_USD_or_numeric_per_Unit_column: 0.01 (extra fee: +1% of charge if FX needed)
Premium_USD_or_numeric_per_Unit_column: 0.01 (extra fee: +1% of charge if FX needed)
Notes: Not USD. Added when Stripe applies currency conversion per their pricing.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Usage billed per token; check OpenAI for any promotional credits (varies).
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Raise org limits, use prepaid billing, or negotiate enterprise when monthly token spend is large or you need commitments.
Notes: Matches model in src/app/api/chat/receptionist/route.ts (gpt-4o-mini). Starter: feature off so 0 unless you override plan rules.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Same account billing as input tokens.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Same as input row; output tokens usually dominate cost.
Notes: Output token rate. Applies only if AI is enabled on Growth/Premium. Verify rates on OpenAI pricing page.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Billed per call when feature enabled; no separate Pro tier for this line item.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Disable or rate-limit tool if search-call costs spike.
Notes: Only if you enable OpenAI web search tool usage in your AI flows. Reference list price.

Free_or_included_before_overage: Depends on carrier/provider; often pay-as-you-go per segment.
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: Choose Twilio (or other) paid plan when you implement SMS and know monthly volume.
Notes: Twilio is listed in UI, but no SMS sending integration was found in API routes. Replace TBD with your provider rate per message.

Line_item: Estimated cost to operate one account per month (USD)
Free_or_included_before_overage: n/a
When_to_scale_Pro_or_paid_tier: n/a
Notes: Illustrative only: 25 active tenants, $65/mo shared stack even split ($2.60 each), plus usage ($0.15/$0.65/$1.80) and AI ($0/$1.20/$3.00). Not audited. Update when you have real bills and tenant count.
